title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation designed to help teachers introduce AI and machine learning foundations in schools. The program provides research-backed lessons, videos, worksheets, and training to support educators and students worldwide, with delivery in over 165 countries.
